title: Setup and Operation of PX2+ Photometric Transmitter With Integrated Fluorescence Probe for Cell Culture
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"72aep","text":"This protocol describes the setup and operation of the PX2+ Photometric Transmitter with an integrated fluorescence probe for real time fluorescence measurement and optional data logging. Two operating modes are described: use with the PX2+ Control Panel App for data logging and calibration, and standalone operation for rapid measurements without data collection. This protocol is intended for reproducible fluorescence measurements across users and experimental sessions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"p6n4","text":"Ensure that all components are present and undamaged.\nConfirm that the PX2+ Control Panel App is available on the provided USB flash drive or already installed on the computer.\nDetermine whether the experiment requires data logging or only real time fluorescence visualization.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"ai4n9","text":"PX2+ Photometric Transmitter","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9b9r4","text":"Integrated fluorescence probe","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"64fqg","text":"Power supply compatible with PX2+","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8sbja","text":"USB cable","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a508c","text":"Computer with PX2+ Control Panel App installed","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b0s8t","text":"USB flash drive containing PX2+ Control Panel App","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Install the PX2+ Control Panel App on the computer using the provided USB flash drive.
Connect the integrated fluorescence probe to the PX2+ Photometric Transmitter.
Connect the PX2+ Photometric Transmitter to the computer using the USB cable.
Supply power to the PX2+ Photometric Transmitter only after the USB connection has been established.
Launch the PX2+ Control Panel App on the computer.
Verify that the device is recognized by the software interface.
Enable data logging by navigating to Tools, then Logging Setup, then Status, and selecting Enable Logging.
Select a file location for data storage. Fluorescence data will be recorded and saved as a CSV file.
Confirm that fluorescence signal values are updating in real time within the application interface.
Ensure that the PX2+ Photometric Transmitter is not connected to a computer.
Connect the integrated fluorescence probe to the PX2+ Photometric Transmitter.
Supply power to the PX2+ Photometric Transmitter.
Observe real time fluorescence output via the device interface.
creator: Ugo Okwuadigbo
